subcodes.first_line: O thou who strivest to exalt the Word of God! Thy letters have been received, and, God willing, a reply shall be dispatched in due course [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ساعی در اعلاء کلمه الله مراسلات آنجناب واصل و انشاء الله بنوبت جواب ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
